documents.title: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification for Kennedy's HHS Secretary role. Marks standard certification sections for ethics-agreement obligations, including resignations, divestitures, transaction reporting, recusals and ethics briefing.

documents.title: Conflict Waiver
documents.summary: Conflict-of-interest waiver record for Kennedy's HHS Secretary role. The OGE index directs requesters to contact the agency for the document; it is not publicly downloadable from the OGE portal.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement for HHS Secretary role.

documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Nominee 278 form for HHS Secretary position, including disclosure of financial interests and outside positions.

documents.title: Other
documents.summary: Presidential-candidate public disclosure record, amended December 12, 2024. Document content is not publicly downloadable from the OGE portal; available via Form 201 request.

documents.title: Other
documents.summary: Presidential-candidate public disclosure record, amended December 12, 2024. Document content is not publicly downloadable from the OGE portal; available via Form 201 request.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Verified against ProPublica's appointee page for Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ProPublica's page embeds 2 unique DocumentCloud disclosure documents; Open Cabinet may list additional OGE-indexed ethics, compliance, certificate, waiver, or request-only records that ProPublica does not expose as separate DocumentCloud PDFs. No contradictory filing record was identified in this check.
